threads: unifying user notifications service (merged from email-notifications and push-notifications)
centralizing logging into Datadog from CloudWatch
building admin tooling for customer success team
API SDK generation pipeline (TypeScript and Python)
database read replica provisioning for reporting workloads

messages.content: Five tracks today including a merge — email notifications and push notifications are merging into a single service. Plus Datadog logging consolidation, admin tooling, SDK pipeline, and read replica provisioning. Walk through each.
Email notifications and push notifications — should we merge them?
Yes — merging molt-email-notifications and molt-push-notifications into a unified service molt-notifications. Repo github.com/moltaicorp/molt-notifications.
Logging unification — Datadog?
Yes, centralizing into Datadog. API key in kv/prod/datadog/api-key. Site is datadoghq.com. Retention 90 days.
Admin tool for CS team — URL?
https://admin.moltaicorp.com. Access scoped to CustomerSuccessAdmin role.
SDK pipeline?
TypeScript SDK to npm:@moltai/sdk, Python SDK to pypi:moltai-sdk. Current version 3.4.0.
Read replica for reporting?
Provisioning molt-prod-ro.cluster-ro-xyz.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com on db.r6g.2xlarge. Reporting role reporting_ro.
Both old services deprecated?
Both molt-email-notifications and molt-push-notifications get retired. New unified service molt-notifications takes over. Single repo at github.com/moltaicorp/molt-notifications.
CloudWatch decommission?
CloudWatch retained for AWS-native logs only. App logs all flow to datadoghq.com via the agent. Retention 90 days.
Feature set?
Customer lookup, plan changes, refund issuance, audit trail. All gated behind CustomerSuccessAdmin role.
Auto-publish on tag?
Yes, GitHub Actions publishes both npm:@moltai/sdk and pypi:moltai-sdk on git tag matching v*. Current is 3.4.0.
Reporting tools pointed at it?
Tableau and Looker pointed at molt-prod-ro.cluster-ro-xyz.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com under role reporting_ro. Instance class db.r6g.2xlarge sufficient for current load.
Migration sequence?
Start with email channel in molt-notifications. Then push channel. Both old services (molt-email-notifications, molt-push-notifications) shut down once parity confirmed.
